title: Ice Introduction
intendedTensionBeat: The obvious rescue route is gated by ice that must be invested in early.
intendedReleaseBeat: Breaking ice reveals useful future value and makes the rescue route feel clever.
expectedPath: Break ice on the rescue lane before spending actions on cleaner but lower-value groups.
expectedFailMode: Player ignores the frozen lane and runs out of tempo opening the real route.
designNotes: Ice must matter. The level fails if ice can be ignored cleanly.
